creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
portsnap fetch update doesn't currently update INDEX-11 files (for CURRENT) unlike other OSVERSIONS, requiring a manual `make fetchindex` to update the index files, which are available.

Make portsnap update the INDEX files for CURRENT so this isn't necessary.

Asked Colin about this on IRC:

<cperciva> koobs: but please email delphij, he should be able to do it.  (and if he doesn't know how, I need to teach him)
